sentence: 我用胶带把破损的书皮粘好了。
pinyin: Wǒ yòng jiāo dài bǎ pò sǔn de shū pí zhān hǎo le.
english: I used tape to fix the damaged book cover.

sentence: 她拌了一盘凉拌黄瓜当下酒菜。
pinyin: Tā bàn le yī pán liángbàn huángguā dāng xiàjiǔcài.
english: She made a plate of cold cucumber salad to go with the drinks.

sentence: 这个地段的房价比较高。
pinyin: Zhège dì duàn de fáng jià bǐ jiào gāo.
english: Housing prices in this area are relatively high.

sentence: 阳光透过窗帘投射在地板上。
pinyin: Yángguāng tòuguò chuānglián tóushè zài dìbǎn shàng.
english: Sunlight cast through the curtains onto the floor.

sentence: 球队在决赛中失利，非常可惜。
pinyin: Qiú duì zài jué sài zhōng shī lì, fēi cháng kě xī.
english: The team suffered defeat in the final, which was a real shame.
